{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Worldseed
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A [[Worldseed]] is a condensed pearl of raw existence and authority.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus]] forged his weapons using the energy of a stolen [[Worldseed]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
